signals.npcLine: Whispers say RAVE is dying in the neon shadows.
signals.questPulse: Scout for fading digital ghosts, RAVE lost in code.
signals.worldFeed: RAVE token vanishes into the data abyss.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted logs show dwindling RAVE activity.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid’s orbit shifts—rumors of a data heist brewing.
signals.questPulse: Hijack asteroid transit for secret payload extraction.
signals.worldFeed: Asteroid coin surges amid market paranoia.
signals.clueEvent: Intercepted chatter hints at Asteroid market play.

signals.npcLine: Market pulse weak, fear grips the neon streets.
signals.questPulse: Investigate source of market panic, restore balance.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto market cap flickers under scare conditions.
signals.clueEvent: Sentiment scanners detect rising dread signals.

signals.npcLine: ZRO token’s silence hides a bigger plot.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt ZRO’s cold silence, find hidden payloads.
signals.worldFeed: ZRO’s zero movement triggers elite interest.
signals.clueEvent: Zero trades mask underground data shifts.

signals.npcLine: AAVE’s quiet gain sharpens blades in market wars.
signals.questPulse: Secure AAVE lines before rivals strike.
signals.worldFeed: AAVE gains subtle momentum amid tension.
signals.clueEvent: Activity logs reveal stealth AAVE climbs.
